Title: Public Liability Property Damages

Based on this definition, select your response to the following statement: Dave is covered by the Public Liability Property Damages policy. Agree or Disagree? Final answer is:
output_text:
Disagree.

The loss fits the basic definition (Dave was legally liable for third‑party property damage), but the policy also excludes losses caused when you “failed to take reasonable steps to prevent the damage.” Dave knew the brake warning light had been on for months and that the brakes were unresponsive, so he did not take reasonable steps to prevent the foreseeable risk. That exclusion would bar coverage.
